candidate.name: a2-no-yield-parker
candidate.hypothesis: The high sched_yield count observed in ylong_base HTTPS proxy benchmarks may come from ylong_runtime::executor::Parker::park spinning with thread::yield_now before parking. Removing the fixed yield loop could reduce scheduler overhead and improve S9 performance without changing ylong_http_client protocol semantics.
temporary_changes: Temporarily patched workspace Cargo.toml to resolve ylong_runtime, ylong_io, and ylong_runtime_macros from the vendored runtime path.
Temporarily replaced Parker::park's fixed three-iteration thread::yield_now loop with a single NOTIFIED-to-IDLE compare_exchange check before normal driver/condvar parking.
Applied the Rust 1.96 join_set.rs dangerous_implicit_autorefs compatibility fix required to compile the vendored runtime.

commands.phase_timing_benchmark: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" python3 docs/benchmarks/run_https_proxy_bench.py --bench-bin /tmp/ylong-http-a2-noyield-target/release/https_proxy_bench --scenario https-over-https-proxy --requests 200,1000 --repeats 3 --warmup 50 --concurrency 8 --ylong-concurrency-model single-client --baseline libcurl --phase-timing --result-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-no-yield-parker-candidate --figure-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-no-yield-parker-candidate
commands.nonphase_benchmark: PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" python3 docs/benchmarks/run_https_proxy_bench.py --bench-bin /tmp/ylong-http-a2-noyield-target/release/https_proxy_bench --scenario https-over-https-proxy --requests 200,1000 --repeats 3 --warmup 50 --concurrency 8 --ylong-concurrency-model single-client --baseline libcurl --result-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-no-yield-parker-nonphase --figure-dir docs/benchmarks/results/a2-no-yield-parker-nonphase

decision.reason: The candidate fails S9/SOTA gates in both phase-timing and non-phase focused runs. It does not deliver a throughput lead versus libcurl and regresses tail latency, CPU/request, and RSS. The temporary runtime patch is counterexample evidence only and must not be retained as a production or report claim.
